research_topic: Code-graph CALLS edge extraction regression investigation. Primary artifact: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/007-code-graph/004-code-graph-hook-improvements/code-graph-zero-calls-investigation.md. Querying calls_from/calls_to for handleMemoryContext returns zero CALLS edges despite the function having 20+ callees. Root cause hypothesis: regex-based extraction instead of AST-based. Determine the exact defect, how to fix it, what regression test would catch it, and whether other symbols are affected. Produce concrete recommended fix with target_files.
